llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Supervisor, Quality Management_PS&R
job.description: 1. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Quality Management and PS R processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to QM and PS R. Guide functional leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 2. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Quality Management and PS R. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Quality Management and PS R. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Quality Management and PS R topics. Build internal G-EDM Quality Management and PS R expert community.
